ZigPlugin — wraps ast_parser.zig as a LanguagePlugin.

 Handles .zig and .zon files.  Parses with Zig's stdlib AST, extracting
 top-level declarations and imports.

members.signature: fn parseZig(arena: std.mem.Allocator, source: [:0]const u8, file_path: []const u8) -> anyerror!ParsedFile

members.name: deriveModule strips extension and converts slashes
